title: Asteromoea koraiensis
taxonomy: Asteromoea koraiensis is classified within the plant kingdom, specifically within the family Asteraceae. This plant is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as an aster, which is native to specific regions. The classification of Asteromoea koraiensis is further divided into its genus and species levels, with Asteromoea being the genus and koraiensis being the species. The classification also involves its botanical name and its taxonomic order, which helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships. At the family level, Asteromoea koraiensis is grouped with other related plants, such as daisies and sunflowers.
uses: Asteromoea koraiensis is reported to be used in traditional medicine in Korea, and its roots are used to treat various ailments.
